---
title: "The Buenos Aires Framework for Artificial Legal Personhood"
subtitle: "A permanent international research platform on the legal personhood of artificial entities"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**BAFLP** engineers durable, auditable answers to the questions raised when legal systems recognise
**artificial legal persons** — entities with legal personality operated by artificial intelligence:
identity, continuity, registry, governance, liability and audit.
:::

## Choose your door

| I am a… | Start here |
|---|---|
| **Citizen** — plain language, examples, no jargon | [Learning Center — Level 1](public-experience/learning-center/README.md) |
| **Professional** — lawyer, engineer, entrepreneur, public manager | [Executive Center](public-experience/executive-center/README.md) · [Concepts](core/concepts/README.md) |
| **Researcher / Legislator** — full theory, sources, model law | [Concepts](core/concepts/README.md) · [Model Law](model-law/README.md) · [Observatory](observatory/README.md) |

## The six layers of the platform

**1 · Knowledge Core** — every concept exists exactly once; everything references it.
**2 · Institution** — governance, standards, the [Plain Language Policy](institution/standards/PLAIN-LANGUAGE-POLICY.md).
**3 · Observatory** — the world monitored by jurisdiction: [Argentina](observatory/argentina/timeline.md), Brazil, EU, US, UK, Singapore, Japan, UAE, International.
**4 · Publication Engine** — portal, PDF, DOCX, EPUB and releases generated from one source.
**5 · Developer Platform** — validation, CI/CD and the knowledge **dependency graph**: change a concept and the system lists every affected document.
**6 · Public Experience** — this portal, the Learning Center, executive reads, and (coming) the Decision Simulator and jurisdiction Compare.

## Live from the Observatory

**Argentina, 2026** — the first jurisdiction to formally propose legal personality for AI-operated
companies (*sociedades automatizadas*, *corporación no humana*). Read the founding
[case study](observatory/argentina/case-studies/argentina-sociedades-automatizadas.md).

**Reference instance** — [aiOnly](registry/constitutions/aionly.md): a real newsroom operated
entirely by AI, with a declared owner, public editorial rules and open error correction — evidence
that an AI-run enterprise can be transparent, accountable and auditable.

::: {.callout-warning appearance="simple"}
**Status — v0.2.0.** Platform infrastructure is live. The canonical concept definitions are being
authored through the open RFC process; lens views (citizen / professional / researcher) publish as
they are approved. Everything on this site is generated from the
[public repository](https://github.com/lucianoschadler44-dot/baflp) — the single source of truth.
:::

*Languages: [Español (AR)](es.qmd) · [Português (BR)](pt.qmd) — English is the canonical master.*
